title: Purification of RNA from a DNA/RNA Extract
author: Roey Angel
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bftbjnin

steps.title: Prepare the following mixture in a 1.5 ml tube
steps.instruction: Prepare the following mixture in a 1.5 ml tube: 10 µL to 42 µL of TNA extract ( 1 µg to 3 µg of DNA). undetermined, TURBO DNase buffer 10x undetermined, RNaseOUT undetermined, 0,1M DTT undetermined, Turbo DNase per up to 2 µg, DNA Complete to 50 µL with RNase-free water TURBO™ DNase (2 U/µL) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #AM2238 RNaseOUT™ Recombinant Ribonuclease Inhibitor Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #10777019 USB Dithiothreitol (DTT) 0.1M Solution Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #707265ML (CAS: 3483-12-3) Nuclease-free autoclaved DEPC-treated water Carl Roth Catalog #T143.1 (CAS: 7732-18-5)

steps.title: Add 250 µL, Binding Buffer
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL, Binding Buffer . GeneJET RNA Cleanup and Concentration Micro Kit Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #K0841

steps.title: Add 300 µL, absolute ethanol
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL, absolute ethanol . Ethanol, Absolute, Molecular Biology Grade Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP2818500

steps.title: Transfer the mixture to the Gene...
steps.instruction: Transfer the mixture to the Gene JET RNA Purification Micro Column preassembled with a collection tube. Centrifuge the column for 14000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute . Discard the flow-through. Place the GeneJET RNA Purification Micro Column back into the collection tube.

steps.title: Add 700 µL, Wash Buffer 1...
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL, Wash Buffer 1 (supplemented with ethanol) to the GeneJET RNA Purification Micro Column and centrifuge for 14000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute . Discard the flow-through and place the purification column back into the collection tube. GeneJET RNA Cleanup and Concentration Micro Kit Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #K0841

steps.title: Add 700 µL, Wash Buffer 2...
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL, Wash Buffer 2 (supplemented with ethanol) to the GeneJET RNA Purification Micro Column and centrifuge for 14000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute . Discard the flow-through and place the purification column back into the collection tube. GeneJET RNA Cleanup and Concentration Micro Kit Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #K0841

steps.title: Centrifuge the empty GeneJET RNA Purification...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the empty GeneJET RNA Purification Micro Column for an additional 14000 x g, Room temperature, 2 minutes to completely remove residual Wash Buffer. This step is essential to avoid residual ethanol in the purified RNA solution. The presence of ethanol in the RNA sample may inhibit downstream enzymatic reactions.

steps.title: Transfer the GeneJET RNA Purification Micro...
steps.instruction: Transfer the GeneJET RNA Purification Micro Column into a clean 1.5 ml Collection Tube tube.

steps.title: Add 10 µL to 20 µL,...
steps.instruction: Add 10 µL to 20 µL, RNA storage solution or nuclease-free water to the GeneJET RNA Purification Micro Column. Centrifuge for 14000 rpm, Room temperature, 1 minute to elute the RNA. THE RNA Storage Solution Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #AM7000

steps.title: Discard the purification column
steps.instruction: Discard the purification column. Use the purified RNA immediately in downstream applications or store at -20 °C or -80 °C until use. Proceed to cDNA synthesis using superscript IV For prolonged storage (more than 1 month), storage at -80 °C is recommended. cDNA synthesis using SuperScript™ IV by Roey Angel
